message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first simulation expectation check (tick 263)

Migrates the production `check_expectation` method on the simulation
sandbox to use the cx-first wezterm variant:

- `self.mock.get_text(*pane, false)` →
  `get_text_with_cx(&expect_cx, *pane, false)`

`check_expectation` is an async production method (not test-only) used
by the simulation engine to evaluate `ExpectationKind::Contains` against
live pane content. Resolves cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`
at call time since the fn itself doesn't thread Cx through its signature.

Cx-cancel during expectation evaluation now cleanly aborts the pane-text
fetch through the mock wezterm backend, rather than running the full
get_text request before unwinding.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 77 (187-263).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 39 (runtime 7 + mcp 2 + tui 8 + web 4
+ mcp_helpers 2 + mcp_tools 10 + workflows/runner 1
+ workflows/account_steps 1 + tx_execution 3 + simulation 1).
main.rs cross-crate total: 127 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
